summary: Completed Stops Persistence Bug Fix - Backend Testing Complete. All 12 tests passed. The bug fix ensures completed waypoints remain visible and persist across API calls (GET /api/stops, POST /api/optimize, GET /api/navigation).
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/stops (line 569-572): Returns ALL stops without filtering - CORRECT
POST /api/stops/{id}/complete (lines 685-698): Sets completed=true, delivery_status='delivered', completed_at - CORRECT
POST /api/stops/{id}/uncomplete (lines 700-713): Sets completed=false, delivery_status='pending', completed_at=None - CORRECT
POST /api/optimize (lines 2412-2416): Separates completed_stops, returns optimized_stops + completed_stops - CORRECT
GET /api/navigation (lines 3112-3115): Separates completed_stops, returns stops + completed_stops - CORRECT
GET /api/navigation completed_count (line 3331): Uses len(completed_stops) for accurate count - CORRECT
seed_data_creation: Tests use existing stops in database, complete/uncomplete them, then restore original state
context_for_next_testing_agent: Completed stops persistence bug fix verified. All backend APIs correctly handle completed stops: GET /api/stops returns all stops, POST /api/optimize appends completed stops at end, GET /api/navigation includes completed stops with accurate completed_count. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_completed_stops_persistence.py can be reused for regression testing.

tests_executed.test_get_stops_includes_completed_stop_a: PASS - Completed stop still in response
tests_executed.test_optimize_returns_completed_stops: PASS - Completed stops appended at end of optimized stops
tests_executed.test_navigation_returns_completed_stops: PASS - Completed stops in navigation response
tests_executed.test_navigation_completed_count_accurate: PASS - completed_count matches actual completed stops
tests_executed.test_complete_preserves_stop_order: PASS - Order field preserved after complete
tests_executed.test_complete_preserves_all_stop_fields: PASS - All fields (address, lat, lng, name, priority) preserved

bug_fix_verification.root_cause_3_store_overwrite: Backend returns correct data - frontend store fix is separate
bug_fix_verification.root_cause_4_geojson_labels: Backend returns correct data - frontend GeoJSON fix is separate
